description: A refined minimalist template built around editorial whitespace and italic serif typography. Noe prioritizes legibility and calm authority over visual decoration.

visual_style.color_weight: near-pure white with navy text and blue accents
visual_style.imagery_style: high-quality photography, editorial illustration; no clipart or icons without purpose

avoid_for: Dense data-heavy reporting (use Castro or Sunset)
Presentations needing strong institutional color identity
Audiences expecting traditional slide chrome (header bars, bullets)

font_requirements.note: Source Sans 3 is used for all text; Roboto is the fallback.

asset_placeholders.logo: Top-right, max 140×48px. Prefer monochrome or dark version on light master.
asset_placeholders.logo_light: White/inverted logo for the ink (dark navy) master.
asset_placeholders.hero_image: Right-bleed or full-bleed photography. Minimum 1920×1080px; crop-safe center composition recommended.

accessibility.note: Muted gray (#B0B0BC) is for decorative/non-essential text only. Informational text must use #7A7A8C or darker.
